title: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber models on its Agent Platform. These updates focus on faster, more efficient inference for agentic workflows, with the Cyber variant likely optimized for security or specialized tasks. The high community engagement (691 points, 528 comments) indicates significant interest in Google's latest LLM offerings.
